title: compat-openssl11 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1:1.1.1k-5.2]
- Fixes CVE-2025-69419 OpenSSL: Arbitrary code execution due to out-of-bounds write in PKCS#12 processing
  Resolves: RHEL-142722
full_text:
[1:1.1.1k-5.2]
- Fixes CVE-2025-69419 OpenSSL: Arbitrary code execution due to out-of-bounds write in PKCS#12 processing
  Resolves: RHEL-142722

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-4472.html
